intro: Ecbolium brachystachyum, commonly known as the Small Spike Ecbolium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Ecbolium brachystachyum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
